ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan event */,
  "start_scan" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the scan */,
  "end_scan" TEXT /* End timestamp of the scan */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "julian_day" INTEGER /* Julian day representing the day of the year */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the scan occurred */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the hour when the scan occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in Brazil where data was collected */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded during the scan */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature calculated during the scan */,
  "std_dev_temp" REAL /* Standard deviation of the temperature readings */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded during the scan */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded during the scan */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure recorded during the scan */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the scan location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the scan location */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or flag for the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "inserted_by" INTEGER /* User who inserted the data */,
  "inserted_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the data was inserted */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the scan data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation used for the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state's capital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state's capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code corresponding to the state */,
  "avg_min_temp" REAL /* Average minimum temperature for the state */,
  "avg_mean_temp" REAL /* Average mean temperature for the state */,
  "avg_max_temp" REAL /* Average maximum temperature for the state */,
  "avg_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity for the state */,
  "avg_pressure" REAL /* Average pressure for the state */,
  "std_dev_min_temp" REAL /* Standard deviation of the minimum temperature */,
  "std_dev_max_temp" REAL /* Standard deviation of the maximum temperature */,
  "std_dev_mean_temp" REAL /* Standard deviation of the mean temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_statistics_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "scans" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan process */,
  "scan_type" TEXT /* Type of scan conducted (e.g., remote sensing, on-site measurements) */,
  "scan_date" TEXT /* Date of the scan */,
  "scanner_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the scanner or device used */,
  "scan_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the scan */,
  "scan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the scan in seconds */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or flag for the scan */,
  "inserted_by" TEXT /* User who inserted the scan data */,
  "inserted_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the scan data was inserted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scans_scanner_id FOREIGN KEY ("scanner_id") REFERENCES scanners ("scanner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scanners" (
  "scanner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scanner */,
  "scanner_name" TEXT /* Name of the scanning device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the scanning device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the scanner is deployed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the scanner */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the scanner */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the scanner */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the scanner (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scanner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the scan data */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scan that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES scans ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
